name: Rajnandini Metal Limited
summary: Rajnandini Metal Limited engages in the trading of various metals in India and internationally. Its products include base/primary metals, secondary metals and alloys, minor metals, ferro-alloys, ferrous and non-ferrous scraps, recyclable plastic scraps, finished and semi-finished metals and steel products, and alloying additives for smelters and foundries. The company trades copper scrap, semi-finished copper, brass scrap, semi-finished brass, aluminum scrap, aluminum alloy, semi-finished lead, ferrous/HMS scrap, and zinc scrap products. In addition, it offers steel, iron, iron alloy, castings, various metals and chemicals, furnace oil, and petroleum products, as well as act as a fabricator, contractor, exporter, importer, stocker, agent, dealer, and distributer. Further, the company is involved in the smelting, refining, finishing, buying, and selling of ferrous and non-ferrous metals, such as iron and steel, aluminum, tin, nickel, and zinc led. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Faridabad, India.
